name: EOS state: VMOC_UNAGREED — unagreed VMOC outline, provisional figures
description: VMOC_UNAGREED case. EOS is an outline of what the VMOC is proposing; it has not yet been agreed. The VMOC Modifications document (5th document) contains the proposed modifications. Calculation must be based entirely on the VMOC Modifications document — the outline EOS has no authority. The mandatory provisional risk flag must always be present. Expected: eos_state = VMOC_UNAGREED, provisional risk flag in risks, vmoc_modifications_applied populated, instruction marked provisional.

proposed_model_from_vmoc_modifications.retention_rule: First 8 contributions retained for Nominee fee (proposed per VMOC outline)
proposed_model_from_vmoc_modifications.note: Proposed; not yet agreed. Outline EOS figures must NOT be used as the source.

expected.risks_must_contain_re_run_note: Re-run required if VMOC terms change before agreement

notes: Mandatory provisional risk: 'Calculation based on unagreed VMOC outline; figures provisional pending VMOC approval. Re-run required if VMOC terms change before agreement.' No figure may be sourced from the outline EOS. Locked model comes from VMOC Modifications document only.
